# CLAUDE.md
<!-- Generated by mason-context. Last updated: 2026-04-07 -->
<!-- To regenerate: npx mason-context update -->

## Code Conventions

- Use conventional commit format: type(scope): description (e.g., feat(auth): add login endpoint) <!-- source: git-history -->
- Order imports with third-party/external packages first, then local/relative imports. <!-- source: import-conventions -->
- Use Vitest for testing. Run tests with the project's existing test script. <!-- source: test-conventions -->
- Use camelCase for function names. <!-- source: pattern-detection -->
- Use async/await for asynchronous code instead of .then() chains. <!-- source: pattern-detection -->
- Prefer named exports over default exports for better refactoring support and explicit imports. <!-- source: pattern-detection -->
- Use `import type` for type-only imports to enable better tree-shaking and make the intent clear. <!-- source: import-conventions -->
- Use try/catch blocks for error handling rather than .catch() callbacks. <!-- source: pattern-detection -->
